## What changed?

Describe the behavior and user impact.

## Why?

Link the issue or explain the problem.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Exported API impact considered
- [ ] Redis key or script compatibility considered
- [ ] Failure-mode behavior considered

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Changelog updated
